bio: I'm a Product Manager with a design background — which means I can go deep on user problems, speak the language of engineers, and still write a PRD that holds up to scrutiny.
philosophy: I believe the best products are built at the intersection of sharp user insight, disciplined execution, and a bias for shipping. I've done it at payments startups, built AI tools solo from 0 to 1, and automated my own job search pipeline as a live proof point.

experience.summary: Led product and design across 3 apps (consumer, merchant, operations). Owned PRDs, design system, and cross-functional delivery. Drove 20% engagement increase in 3 months and 80% reduction in manual payment reconciliation via AI.
Designed, built, and shipped an AI-powered screening tool in 8 weeks. Multi-model pipeline (Gemini + Claude). Reduced screening time from 45 min to 5 min — 89% efficiency gain.
Led D2C growth, offline-to-online retailer onboarding, and CRO campaigns.
